channel.title: HTML on Saurav Ahmed | Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in HTML on Saurav Ahmed | Personal Blog

item.title: How To write better code
item.description: Steps to better code A guide for beginners This is an early version of a chapter from Your First Year in Code, a book of practical how-to and advice for new developers.
